items.title: Polymarket bets on U.S. marketing blitz to win back trust after 4-year ban: Report
items.description: The prediction market's head of U.S. operations says the business is taking steps to legitimize itself after years of legal scrutiny.

items.title: Crypto Long & Short: With MSTR concerns assuaged, look to traditional signals around BTC
items.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, FalconX’s Gaspar Martin writes that BTC is reaching a market bottom and is poised for a turnaround.

items.title: Crypto VC Paradigm launches $1.2 billion AI fund as it broadens beyond digital assets
items.description: The firm's latest fund backs AI and robotics startups but leadership says it remains committed to crypto investing.

items.title: Dinari, tZERO join forces on turnkey platform for tokenized U.S. equities
items.description: The move comes as firms race to build the infrastructure for blockchain-based stocks and debate how tokenized stocks should work.

items.title: Adam Back's BSTR scraps SPAC merger, seeks new deal
items.description: BSTR and Cantor Equity Partners will not complete their merger under the original July 2025 agreement, with the shareholder postponed indefinitely.

items.title: BNB Chain is building a new layer-1 for high-frequency trading and AI agents
items.description: The network aims to process over 100,000 transactions per second by streaming them directly, eliminating public queues to make trades faster and more secure.

items.title: Citadel abandons multi-year crypto lawsuit to focus on bankruptcy order against an ex-employee
items.description: After winning a 6 million-pound London arbitration award, Citadel dropped its U.S. trade secrets case, saying another judgment would likely go uncollected.

items.title: SpaceX's first bitcoin wallet movements in six months likely don't signal sales
items.description: Onchain trackers found the newly public company shifted a tiny amount of bitcoin between its own addresses. Nothing reached an exchange.

items.title: Bitcoin slides as Iran ceasefire collapse sees $75 oil on Hormuz blockade threats
items.description: Bitcoin price pressure took BTC toward the "crucial" $61,000 mark as oil prices soared on the collapse of the US-Iran ceasefire.

items.title: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
items.description: The non-custodial Bitcoin exchange petitioned to annul a French decree implementing DAC8, arguing the rules could create surveillance and physical risks for up to 135 million European crypto holders.

items.title: India crypto tax filings lag trading activity: Report
items.description: India’s tax department reportedly found that fewer than a quarter of the 645,000 people who made crypto transactions reported them on tax returns.

items.title: The 5 types of real world assets being tokenized fastest onchain
items.description: Tokenized Real World Assets span treasuries, real estate, stocks, commodities and private credit. The sector is still small in TradFi terms but it's growing very, very fast.

items.title: Kazakhstan president signs decree to accelerate crypto adoption
items.description: Kazakhstan targets gas-powered electricity for mining, income tax exemptions for regulated crypto transactions and cross-border stablecoin payments in a new decree signed by the president.

items.title: BTC speculators in focus as analysis says 'textbook Bitcoin bottom' is underway
items.description: Analysis flagged a Bitcoin moving average derivative that last triggered at the end of the 2022 bear market as BTC price action returned to its reversal zone.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Lyn Alden says Bitcoin needs no savior as Strategy sells $216M of BTC
items.description: Bitcoin-focused macroeconomist Lyn Alden said BTC must stand on its own as Strategy sold 3,588 BTC, while warning about leverage risks tied to STRC.

items.title: Trump downplays Iran's nuclear threat as ceasefire collapses
items.description: The president was asked about the ceasefire after an escalation of fighting in the Middle East.

items.title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
items.description: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.

items.title: Delta launches 'basic business' fares without lounge access, seat selection
items.description: Delta is launching basic business and other stripped-down premium classes that come with fewer perks.

items.title: Trump loses latest appeals court bid to restore his name to Kennedy Center
items.description: The appeals court said Trump had failed to provide any evidence that the Kennedy Center's fundraising would be harmed if his name is not attached.

items.title: Kentucky Gov. Beshear presses McConnell to provide health update as speculation grows
items.description: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to a hospital on June 14.

items.title: Used EVs keep getting more expensive amid Iran war, high gas prices
items.description: The Manheim Used Vehicle Value Index for EVs — which tracks prices of used vehicles sold at its U.S. wholesale auctions — increased 12% compared to June 2025.

items.title: Judge orders E. Jean Carroll be paid $5M in damages from Trump verdict
items.description: Trump has been found liable in two trials for defaming E. Jean Carroll when he denied her claim he sexually abused her in a New York department store.

items.title: Waymo to start driverless rides in 4 more U.S. markets as expansion accelerates
items.description: Waymo has a big lead in the nascent U.S. robotaxi market, and is opening up in more cities.

items.description: Trump’s push to get ships moving through the Strait of Hormuz keeps colliding with Tehran’s resistance to cede control

items.transcript_reason:
Could not retrieve a transcript for the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=62e69Bz7-ww! This is most likely caused by:

YouTube is blocking requests from your IP. This usually is due to one of the following reasons:
- You have done too many requests and your IP has been blocked by YouTube
- You are doing requests from an IP belonging to a cloud provider (like AWS, Google Cloud Platform, Azure, etc.). Unfortunately, most IPs from cloud providers are blocked by YouTube.

There are two things you can do to work around this:
1. Use proxies to hide your IP address, as explained in the "Working around IP bans" section of the README (https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api?tab=readme-ov-file#working-around-ip-bans-requestblocked-or-ipblocked-exception).
2. (NOT RECOMMENDED) If you authenticate your requests using cookies, you will be able to continue doing requests for a while. However, YouTube will eventually permanently ban the account that you have used to authenticate with! So only do this if you don't mind your account being banned!

If you are sure that the described cause is not responsible for this error and that a transcript should be retrievable, please create an issue at https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api/issues. Please add which version of youtube_transcript_api you are using and provide the information needed to replicate the error. Also make sure that there are no open issues which already describe your problem!

items.title: All entry-level jobs require 3-5 years of experience. How am I supposed to get that if no one will hire me?
items.description: How to get experience if no one is willing to be your first employer.

items.title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
items.description: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

items.title: Rocket Lab’s stock could surge 250% as the company takes a page out of SpaceX’s book, analyst says
items.description: Morgan Stanley says the bull case for the rocket-launch stock is now much rosier as the company diversifies its business.

items.title: Oil prices touch two-week highs after Trump suggests U.S.-Iran cease-fire is over
items.description: Oil prices touched their highest levels in more than two weeks on Wednesday after President Donald Trump said he believed the cease-fire with Iran was over.

items.title: ‘I’ll happily wait’: Does delaying Social Security make sense for high earners like me?

2. (NOT RECOMMENDED) If you authenticate your requests using cookies, you will be able to continue doing requests for a while. However, YouTube will eventually permanently ban the account that you have used to authenticate with! So only do this if you don't mind your account being banned!

If you are sure that the described cause is not responsible for this error and that a transcript should be retrievable, please create an issue at https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api/issues. Please add which version of youtube_transcript_api you are using and provide the information needed to replicate the error. Also make sure that there are no open issues which already describe your problem!

items.title: Farage ridiculed in parliament as ‘farce’ by-election gets go-ahead
items.description: Reform UK leader’s rivals are running scared, say senior party figures

items.title: FCA says lenders want to let ‘foxes guard the henhouse’ on car finance
items.description: UK regulator alleges in court filing that lenders want to determine own liability for compensation

items.title: Javier Milei wants US-style government shutdowns in Argentina
items.description: Government should suspend functions when lawmakers reach an impasse on spending, says rightwing leader

items.title: How Trump brought non-alignment back from the dead
items.description: The US president is single-handedly reviving a doctrine of the postcolonial left

items.title: Trump grants Ukraine licence to produce Patriot missiles
items.description: US president agrees to longstanding demand from Kyiv to make its own PAC-3 interceptors

items.title: Le Pen revives presidential bid echoing Trump
items.description: French far-right leader portrays herself as a modern-day Joan of Arc going against the political establishment

items.title: Ukraine intensifies attacks on Russian ships in Azov Sea
items.description: Eight small fuel tankers supplying Crimea were hit overnight, says Kyiv

items.title: Segro lays out defence as it battles £12.6bn takeover attempt by US rival
items.description: UK property group believes 925p a share offer by Prologis undervalues its warehouse and data centres business

items.title: Oil Market Calm Shattered by Fresh Hostilities Between US and Iran
items.description: Oil prices are likely to remain volatile as long as the United States and Iran are unable to resolve the status of the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Air Canada Chooses Anko van der Werff, Who Speaks French, as CEO After Language Backlash
items.description: Michael Rousseau, who prompted widespread criticism with a largely English condolence video following a crash in March, will retire.

items.title: In San Francisco, Some Home Sellers Now Ask for OpenAI or Anthropic Stock
items.description: Even before OpenAI and Anthropic go public, they are distorting home sales in the San Francisco Bay Area, as people race to buy and sellers ask for stock instead of cash.

items.title: Lawmakers Target the Power of Health Insurance Giants
items.description: UnitedHealth Group, CVS Health and Cigna are battling efforts to break up their control over prescription drugs.

items.title: Trump Lashes Out at Spain: ‘Cut Off All Trade.’ Here’s Why That’s Unlikely.
items.description: A move against Spain would face political, legal and practical issues and probably provoke a wider trade war with the European Union. It could also roil markets.

items.title: Global Economic Output Looks Slower for 2026, IMF Says
items.description: The I.M.F. projected world output growth would fall to 3 percent for the year, a number pushed down by high commodity prices.

items.title: Jeff Bezos’s Blue Origin Nears a Big Fund-Raising Round
items.description: The rocket company founded by Jeff Bezos is set to take on external investors for the first time, at a $130 billion valuation.

items.title: A New ‘Little House’ Broadens and Updates the Prairie
items.description: A Netflix adaptation of the beloved tale empowers Ma and adds new Black and Native characters to challenge prejudices. The creators know criticism is coming.
